# Third-Party Licenses

This directory bundles redistributable third-party libraries used by the
self-contained dashboard. License texts below are reproduced verbatim from
each project's upstream `LICENSE` file. No license terms have been altered.

---

## 1. Tabulator (tabulator-tables) v6.4.0

- **Attribution:** Tabulator interactive data grid by Oli Folkerd
  (https://tabulator.info/).
- **SPDX:** MIT
- **Source:** https://github.com/olifolkerd/tabulator/blob/master/LICENSE
- **Vendored files:** `tabulator-6.4.0.min.js`, `tabulator-6.4.0.min.css`

```

## 4. Lucide Icons v1.8.0 (lucide-static)

- **Attribution:** Lucide Icons by the Lucide Icons project and Contributors
  (https://lucide.dev/). Subset of icons re-encoded as an SVG `<symbol>`
  sprite at `vendor/icons.svg`.
- **SPDX:** ISC (Lucide project) with MIT (Feather-derived icons by Cole Bemis)
- **Source:** https://github.com/lucide-icons/lucide/blob/main/LICENSE
- **Vendored file:** `icons.svg`

```
ISC License

Copyright (c) 2026 Lucide Icons and Contributors

Permission to use, copy, modify, and/or distribute this software for any
purpose with or without fee is hereby granted, provided that the above
copyright notice and this permission notice appear in all copies.

THE SOFTWARE IS PROVIDED "AS IS" AND THE AUTHOR DISCLAIMS ALL WARRANTIES
WITH REGARD TO THIS SOFTWARE INCLUDING ALL IMPLIED WARRANTIES OF
MERCHANTABILITY AND FITNESS. IN NO EVENT SHALL THE AUTHOR BE LIABLE FOR
ANY SPECIAL, DIRECT, INDIRECT, OR CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGES OR ANY DAMAGES
WHATSOEVER RESULTING FROM LOSS OF USE, DATA OR PROFITS, WHETHER IN AN
ACTION OF CONTRACT, NEGLIGENCE OR OTHER TORTIOUS ACTION, ARISING OUT OF
OR IN CONNECTION WITH THE USE OR PERFORMANCE OF THIS SOFTWARE.

## Compatibility summary

All four upstream licenses (MIT and ISC) are permissive, OSI-approved, and
compatible with redistribution inside an internal/FOUO offline dashboard
provided the copyright/permission notices above are retained. No copyleft
obligations apply; no source code disclosure is required.
